title: PvZ
description: This mod adds Plants vs Zombies to minecraft
body:
![pvzmodtitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ba1979a59ce66f8fbe2c49e8696b8e234f65368.png)

**💡About this mod:**
- this mod aims to add plants vs zombies to minecraft and fit it into minecraft
- if you like plants vs zombies, make sure to check this mod out :)
  
**📥 how to install:**

if you're using the regular minecraft launcher follow those steps:
- download the required mod loader (which is in this case [forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html)) for minecraft version 1.20.1 and run it
- download the mod and its dependency, [geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib).
- go into your mod folder and put the 2 mods there
- run your minecraft forge and have fun with the mod
  
if you're using a third-party launcher, automatically install the mod loader and place the mods into the mods folder
  
**🌻Current plants:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Peashooter
- Sunflower
- Potato Mine
- grave buster
- chomper (has no mechanic yet)
- cherry bomb
- wallnut
- iceberg lettuce

</details>

- **more plants will be added soon**
  
**🧟Current Zombies:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- basic zombie (browncoat)
- conehead zombie (browncoat)
- buckethead zombie (browncoat)
</details>

**❓how to obtain plants:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- plant food can be obtained from smelting bone block in a furnace or by killing pvz zombies
  
- zombies can be spawned from graves
  
- plants can be obtained from the planting table which can be crafted like this:
  ![plantingtable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb5f4d62deea233f746c96e1c2ecc3bc0f31e489.png)
- you'll also need plant seeds which can be obtained from the gardener villager (place a planting table near a villager to turn it into a gardener) or from plant source which spawns in flower forests, plains and sunflower plains
- once you placed the planting table, put in it a plant food and a plant seed, you'll also need sun which can be obtained overtime or via sunflowers

</details>




 **if you got any questions/suggestions, join our [discord](https://discord.gg/pHSv7DJqBz) server**
